nodes.content: Existing h5i push handler in src/main.rs:2588 fans out 'git push +refspec' calls for 4 refs (notes, memory, context, ast). h5i pull is documented in MANUAL.md but the clap CLI has no Pull variant. memory::pull at src/memory.rs:950 already does git fetch for the memory ref alone; we need a top-level pull that mirrors push.
